title: Initiative Sequencing Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger initiative sequencing foundations judgment so strategy work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Initiative Sequencing Foundations is a leverage point inside strategy. It supports the broader goal of vision, positioning, competitive analysis, and strategic planning.
coreConcepts: Initiative Sequencing Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good initiative sequencing foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Initiative Sequencing Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
